arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs SC Freiburg preview: The battle for Champions League places heats up
arts.sum: With just three points between the giants from the Hessen state and the Breisgauers, Tuesday evening’s fixture at the Deutsche Bank Park could prove pivotal in deciding the Bundesliga representatives in Europe’s premier competition next season.

arts.ttl: Omar Marmoush: Will Man City-linked forward play for Eintracht Frankfurt against Freiburg in Bundesliga on Tuesday?
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt head coach Dino Toppmoller delivers an update on the availability of Man City-linked Omar Marmoush ahead of Tuesday's Bundesliga clash with Freiburg.

Just three points separate the two sides with Eintracht sitting in the lofty heights of third. Freiburg boast eight wins and five defeats, but four of their losses came against sides currently in the...

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'in danger' of £70m Man City transfer hijack after Omar Marmoush decision
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester City are reportedly both vying for the services of Eintracht Frankfurt midfielder Hugo Larsson, who is valued at £70m by the German giants.

arts.ttl: Preview: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Freiburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Bundesliga clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Freiburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
